title: CC: VR
body:
**CC: VR** is a **CC: Tweaked** addon for **Vivecraft**!

This addon adds a new VR Peripheral block that players can bind themselves to by right-clicking it. Then, through its peripheral, a computer can attempt to get information from Vivecraft about body part positions, locations, and can even do haptic impulses!

More information on the peripheral's methods will be found on the future wiki!
